/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/spike_viewer_native.dir/spike_viewer_native_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spike_viewer_native.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spike_viewer_native.dir/main_window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spike_viewer_native.dir/recording.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spike_viewer_native.dir/widgets.cpp.o -o spike_viewer_native -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtWidgets.framework/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtConcurrent.framework/QtConcurrent /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtXml.framework/QtXml /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtGui.framework/QtGui /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@5/lib/QtCore.framework/QtCore
